name: pdf-editor-compdf
tagline: ClawHub (107★): PDF Editor edits and organizes PDF pages with merge, insert, reorder, exchange, and crop operations, built on ComPDF page m
verdict: Clean bill on security, quality, and hygiene. Two things to know: it never states what it's out of scope for despite covering 13 distinct PDF operations, and the description doesn't disclose that first use triggers a third-party download — a legitimate first-party vendor SDK, but fetched unpinned via a 'latest'-style URL.
